sentences.sentence: Latchkey child was a term coined to describe children who wore or carried house keys to school so that they could let themselves into their home when they returned from school.
sentences.translation: “挂钥匙儿童”一词用来描述那些把家门钥匙戴在身上或带到学校、以便放学后自己开门回家的孩子。

structure.text: Latchkey child was a term coined to describe children
who wore or carried house keys to school
so that they could let themselves into their home
when they returned from school

difficult_points: coined 是过去分词，修饰 term。
who 修饰 children；so that 表目的，when 再限定回家的时间。

sentences.sentence: The term came into use during the Second World War, when fathers had gone off to war, and mothers had gone into industry, making the tanks, planes, uniforms and bullets the soldiers needed.
sentences.translation: 这个词在第二次世界大战期间开始使用；当时父亲们奔赴战场，母亲们进入工业部门，制造士兵所需的坦克、飞机、制服和子弹。

structure.text: The term came into use during the Second World War
when fathers had gone off to war, and mothers had gone into industry
making the tanks, planes, uniforms and bullets the soldiers needed

difficult_points: when 从句交代术语流行的历史背景。
making 的逻辑主语是 mothers；the soldiers needed 是省略关系词的定语从句。

sentences.sentence: The children went home with keys on chains, ribbons or a piece of string tied around their necks.
sentences.translation: 孩子们回家时，钥匙用链子、丝带或一段绳子系在脖子上。

structure.text: The children went home
with keys on chains, ribbons or a piece of string tied around their necks

difficult_points: with 短语描述孩子回家时随身带钥匙的状态。
tied around their necks 是过去分词短语，修饰 string，也概括钥匙的佩戴方式。

sentences.sentence: Some mothers chose to work the night shift, called the "swing shift", and tucked their children into bed, locked the door and went to the factory.
sentences.translation: 一些母亲选择上被称为“摇摆班”的夜班；她们安顿孩子上床、锁好门，然后去工厂。

structure.text: Some mothers chose to work the night shift
called the "swing shift"
and tucked their children into bed, locked the door and went to the factory

difficult_points: called ... 后置修饰 night shift。
tucked、locked、went 是三个按时间顺序排列的并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: The country's response was prompt and comprehensive.
sentences.translation: 国家迅速作出了全面回应。

structure.text: The country's response
was prompt and comprehensive

difficult_points: prompt 与 comprehensive 是并列表语。
response 指政府和社会对无人照看儿童问题的应对。

sentences.sentence: Programmes were set up in factories, in schools and community centres, to gather in all the children whose parents were busy with the war effort.
sentences.translation: 工厂、学校和社区中心都设立了项目，把所有父母忙于战争工作的孩子集中照看起来。

structure.text: Programmes were set up in factories, in schools and community centres
to gather in all the children
whose parents were busy with the war effort

difficult_points: were set up 是被动语态，to gather ... 说明设立项目的目的。
whose 引导定语从句，修饰 children。

sentences.sentence: These programmes closed promptly when the war ended, and women resumed their roles as housewives.
sentences.translation: 战争一结束，这些项目便迅速关闭，女性重新承担起家庭主妇的角色。

structure.text: These programmes closed promptly
when the war ended
and women resumed their roles as housewives

difficult_points: when 从句说明项目关闭的时间。
and 连接主语不同的两个独立分句。

sentences.sentence: More than sixty years on, there are large numbers of working mothers, but unlike in wartime, the country isn't organised to care for their children.
sentences.translation: 六十多年后的今天，职业母亲人数众多，但与战时不同，国家并没有建立照护她们孩子的体系。

structure.text: More than sixty years on, there are large numbers of working mothers
but unlike in wartime, the country isn't organised to care for their children

difficult_points: sixty years on 表示从前述时期算起六十多年以后。
but 与 unlike 双重突出当下和战时组织照护的反差。

sentences.sentence: Sadly, finding young children at home without adult supervision has become much loo commonplace.
sentences.translation: 令人遗憾的是，年幼儿童在家无人照看的情况已经变得过于常见。

structure.text: finding young children at home without adult supervision
has become much loo commonplace

difficult_points: finding ... 是动名词短语作主语。
loo 是源文 OCR 异常，语义按 too 理解。

sentences.sentence: Latchkey children were once found only among the lower classes, but the situation has gradually spread to the middle and upper classes.
sentences.translation: 过去，挂钥匙儿童只见于社会下层，但这种情况已逐渐蔓延到中产和上层阶级。

structure.text: Latchkey children were once found only among the lower classes
but the situation has gradually spread to the middle and upper classes

difficult_points: were found 是被动语态，描述过去的社会分布。
but 引出该现象跨越阶层的变化。

sentences.sentence: The same is true of adolescent violence.
sentences.translation: 青少年暴力也存在同样的情况。

structure.text: The same
is true of adolescent violence

difficult_points: The same 回指上一句所说的现象向各阶层扩散。
be true of 表示同一判断也适用于另一个对象。

sentences.sentence: In the past, shootings and stabbings were associated primarily with inner city, or poverty stricken areas permeated with abusive families and neglectful schools.
sentences.translation: 过去，枪击和持刀伤人主要与市中心贫困地区联系在一起，而这些地区充斥着施虐家庭和失职学校。

structure.text: shootings and stabbings were associated primarily with inner city, or poverty stricken areas
permeated with abusive families and neglectful schools

difficult_points: were associated with 是被动结构，表示社会认知中的联系。
permeated ... 后置修饰 areas。

sentences.sentence: However, in recent limes, the "teen violence" epidemic has penetrated society at every economic level.
sentences.translation: 然而近来，“青少年暴力”这一流行现象已经渗透到社会的各个经济阶层。

structure.text: in recent limes
the "teen violence" epidemic
has penetrated society at every economic level

difficult_points: epidemic 是比喻，强调青少年暴力广泛扩散。
limes 是源文 OCR 异常，语义按 times 理解。

sentences.sentence: An increase in the number of working mothers, as well as single-parent families, combined with a decrease in extended families that once helped with child care, has contributed to the growing ranks of latchkey kids.
sentences.translation: 职业母亲和单亲家庭数量增加，再加上过去能协助照护儿童的大家庭减少，导致挂钥匙儿童群体不断扩大。

structure.text: An increase in the number of working mothers, as well as single-parent families, combined with a decrease in extended families
that once helped with child care
has contributed to the growing ranks of latchkey kids

difficult_points: 中心主语是 An increase，因此谓语用单数 has。
combined with ... 是过去分词短语；that 修饰 extended families。

sentences.sentence: According to one census, one-third of all school-age children in the United States are, for some part of the week, latchkey kids, that is, they go home to an empty house or apartment.
sentences.translation: 一项人口普查显示，美国三分之一的学龄儿童每周都有一部分时间属于挂钥匙儿童，也就是说，他们回到的是空无一人的房屋或公寓。

structure.text: one-third of all school-age children in the United States are, for some part of the week, latchkey kids
that is, they go home to an empty house or apartment

difficult_points: for some part of the week 是插入状语，说明无人照看的频率。
that is 引出对 latchkey kids 的具体解释。

sentences.sentence: The total number may be between five and seven million children between five and thirteen years old.
sentences.translation: 总数可能达到五百万至七百万名五到十三岁的儿童。

structure.text: The total number
may be between five and seven million children
between five and thirteen years old

difficult_points: 两个 between 分别表示人数区间和年龄区间。
may 表示该数字是估算而非精确统计。

sentences.sentence: Marian Wright Edelman, the director of the Children's Defence Fund, thinks it's close to 16 million children.
sentences.translation: 儿童保护基金会主任 Marian Wright Edelman 认为，这一数字接近一千六百万名儿童。

structure.text: Marian Wright Edelman
the director of the Children's Defence Fund
thinks it's close to 16 million children

difficult_points: 逗号间的名词短语是人物身份同位语。
it's close to ... 是省略 that 的 thinks 宾语从句，it 指总人数。

sentences.sentence: The Census Bureau found that 15% were home alone before school, 76% after school and 9% at night.
sentences.translation: 人口普查局发现，15%的儿童上学前独自在家，76%放学后独自在家，9%则在夜间独自在家。

structure.text: The Census Bureau found
that 15% were home alone before school, 76% after school and 9% at night

difficult_points: that 从句报告三组不同时段的数据。
后两项省略了 were home alone，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Presumably, the 9% have parents who work night shifts.
sentences.translation: 据推测，这9%的儿童其父母上夜班。

structure.text: the 9% have parents
who work night shifts

difficult_points: the 9% 指上一句夜间独自在家的儿童。
who 从句修饰 parents；Presumably 表明这是推断。

sentences.sentence: One-half of all children in the country aged 12 to 14 are home alone for an average of seven hours a week.
sentences.translation: 全国12至14岁的儿童中，有一半平均每周独自在家七小时。

structure.text: One-half of all children in the country aged 12 to 14
are home alone for an average of seven hours a week

difficult_points: aged 12 to 14 是过去分词短语，修饰 children。
for an average of ... 表示平均持续时间。

sentences.sentence: The very poor in America arc less likely to leave their children alone at home, or allow them to go home alone, than families who earn twice their level of income.
sentences.translation: 美国最贫困的家庭反而比收入为其两倍的家庭更少把孩子独自留在家中，或让孩子独自回家。

structure.text: The very poor in America arc less likely to leave their children alone at home, or allow them to go home alone
than families who earn twice their level of income

difficult_points: less likely ... than 构成比较；leave 与 allow 是并列不定式。
who 修饰 families；arc 是源文 OCR 异常，语义按 are 理解。

sentences.sentence: This is probably because the very poor live in less safe neighbourhoods, and have fewer friends or family who can step in, in case of emergency.
sentences.translation: 这或许是因为最贫困者居住的社区较不安全，而且能在紧急情况下出手帮忙的亲友更少。

structure.text: This is probably because the very poor live in less safe neighbourhoods, and have fewer friends or family
who can step in, in case of emergency

difficult_points: because 后两个谓语 live 与 have 共享主语 the very poor。
who 修饰 friends or family；step in 表示介入帮助。

sentences.sentence: In spite of the hours spent on the job, working mothers spend an average of five-and-a-half hours a day with their children.
sentences.translation: 尽管工作占去不少时间，职业母亲平均每天仍与孩子相处五个半小时。

structure.text: In spite of the hours spent on the job
working mothers spend an average of five-and-a-half hours a day with their children

difficult_points: In spite of 引出让步；spent on the job 后置修饰 hours。
working 在 working mothers 中是形容词，意为有工作的母亲。

sentences.sentence: When latchkey children are functioning well, we don't hear about them.
sentences.translation: 挂钥匙儿童适应良好时，我们通常不会听到有关他们的消息。

structure.text: When latchkey children are functioning well
we don't hear about them

difficult_points: When 从句设定这些儿童不受关注的条件和时间。
them 指 latchkey children。

sentences.sentence: But we do hear about the one-third of all complaints to child welfare agencies which involve latchkey children.
sentences.translation: 但在儿童福利机构收到的全部投诉中，有三分之一涉及挂钥匙儿童，这些我们确实会听说。

structure.text: we do hear about the one-third of all complaints to child welfare agencies
which involve latchkey children

difficult_points: do 用于强调 hear，突出与上一句的反差。
which 修饰 complaints，而不是 agencies。

sentences.sentence: We know about the 51% who are doing poorly in school.
sentences.translation: 我们也知道，其中有51%的孩子在学校表现不佳。

structure.text: We know about the 51%
who are doing poorly in school

difficult_points: the 51% 指挂钥匙儿童中的这一比例。
who 从句修饰被百分比代指的儿童。

sentences.sentence: Most teachers believe that being alone at home is the number one cause of school failure.
sentences.translation: 大多数教师认为，独自在家是学业失败的首要原因。

structure.text: Most teachers believe
that being alone at home is the number one cause of school failure

difficult_points: that 从句作 believe 的宾语。
being alone at home 是动名词短语，在从句中作主语。

sentences.sentence: The afternoon hours are the peak time for juvenile crime.
sentences.translation: 下午时段是青少年犯罪的高峰期。

structure.text: The afternoon hours
are the peak time for juvenile crime

difficult_points: peak time 表示某现象最集中发生的时段。
for juvenile crime 限定高峰所针对的现象。

sentences.sentence: In the last 11 years, juvenile crime has increased 48%.
sentences.translation: 过去11年中，青少年犯罪增加了48%。

structure.text: In the last 11 years
juvenile crime has increased 48%

difficult_points: 现在完成时 has increased 表示从过去延续至今的变化。
48% 是增幅，不是犯罪总量所占比例。

sentences.sentence: The Carnegie Council on Adolescent Development found that 8th graders who are alone 11 hours a week are twice as likely to abuse drugs as adolescents who are busy after school.
sentences.translation: 卡内基青少年发展委员会发现，每周独处11小时的八年级学生滥用药物的可能性，是放学后有活动安排的青少年的两倍。

structure.text: The Carnegie Council on Adolescent Development found
that 8th graders who are alone 11 hours a week are twice as likely to abuse drugs as adolescents who are busy after school

difficult_points: 两个 who 从句分别修饰 8th graders 和 adolescents。
twice as likely ... as 构成倍数比较。

sentences.sentence: Unsupervised children are more likely to become depressed, smoke cigarettes and marijuana and drink alcohol.
sentences.translation: 无人监管的儿童更容易抑郁、吸食香烟和大麻，并饮酒。

structure.text: Unsupervised children
are more likely to become depressed, smoke cigarettes and marijuana and drink alcohol

difficult_points: Unsupervised 是过去分词作前置定语。
be likely to 后连接 become、smoke、drink 三个并列动作。

sentences.sentence: They are also more likely to be the victims of crimes.
sentences.translation: 他们也更有可能成为犯罪的受害者。

structure.text: They
are also more likely to be the victims of crimes

difficult_points: They 回指上一句的 Unsupervised children。
to be ... 表示他们遭受犯罪侵害的风险。

sentences.sentence: When home alone, latchkey children generally watch television, eat snacks, play with pets and fight with siblings.
sentences.translation: 独自在家时，挂钥匙儿童通常看电视、吃零食、与宠物玩耍，或和兄弟姐妹打架。

structure.text: When home alone
latchkey children generally watch television, eat snacks, play with pets and fight with siblings

difficult_points: When home alone 省略了 they are。
watch、eat、play、fight 是四个并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Adolescents who fall under the classification of latchkey children are more likely than others of the same age group to experience feelings of rage and isolation and to express those emotions in a physically aggressive manner.
sentences.translation: 被归为挂钥匙儿童的青少年，比同龄人更容易感到愤怒和孤立，也更容易以肢体攻击的方式表达这些情绪。

structure.text: Adolescents who fall under the classification of latchkey children
are more likely than others of the same age group
to experience feelings of rage and isolation and to express those emotions in a physically aggressive manner

difficult_points: who 从句限定 Adolescents。
两个 to 不定式并列，说明风险更高的两种表现。

sentences.sentence: While there are certainly genetic and biological factors involved in the development of an adolescent's propensity towards acting out their feelings of rage and isolation, environment also plays a key role in this arena.
sentences.translation: 尽管青少年把愤怒和孤立感付诸行为的倾向确实涉及遗传和生物因素，环境在这方面也发挥着关键作用。

structure.text: While there are certainly genetic and biological factors involved in the development of an adolescent's propensity towards acting out their feelings of rage and isolation
environment also plays a key role in this arena

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句；involved ... 后置修饰 factors。
acting out 是 propensity towards 的动名词宾语，指把情绪外化为行为。

sentences.sentence: Sociologists have found that many latchkey children, because they are frequently raised in dysfunctional families, are taught by example to be manipulative, secretive and unpredictable.
sentences.translation: 社会学家发现，许多挂钥匙儿童由于常在功能失调的家庭中长大，会从身边的示范中学会操纵、隐瞒和反复无常。

structure.text: Sociologists have found
that many latchkey children
because they are frequently raised in dysfunctional families
are taught by example to be manipulative, secretive and unpredictable

difficult_points: because 从句插入 that 宾语从句内部，解释儿童形成这些特征的原因。
are taught 与 are raised 均为被动语态。

sentences.sentence: They often instinctively develop a sense of timing and management of their emotions.
sentences.translation: 他们往往会本能地形成把握时机和管理情绪的能力。

structure.text: They
often instinctively develop
a sense of timing and management of their emotions

difficult_points: They 指 many latchkey children。
timing 与 management of emotions 并列，说明他们形成的两类控制能力。

sentences.sentence: These are skills that can be easily and directly used to portray a false picture of themselves and their living situation.
sentences.translation: 这些技能很容易被直接用于塑造关于他们自身及生活状况的虚假形象。

structure.text: These are skills
that can be easily and directly used to portray a false picture of themselves and their living situation

difficult_points: These 回指把握时机和管理情绪的能力。
that 修饰 skills；can be used 是被动语态，to portray 表目的。

sentences.sentence: Making the decision: When is a child ready to be home alone?
sentences.translation: 作出决定：孩子什么时候才适合独自在家？

structure.text: Making the decision
When is a child ready to be home alone

difficult_points: 冒号前是本节主题，后面是具体问题。
be ready to ... 表示具备独自在家的成熟度和能力。

expressions.text: be ready to be home alone

sentences.sentence: Personality characteristics, skills, and maturity are useful criteria for determining a child's readiness to be home alone.
sentences.translation: 性格特征、技能和成熟度，是判断孩子是否适合独自在家的实用标准。

structure.text: Personality characteristics, skills, and maturity
are useful criteria
for determining a child's readiness to be home alone

difficult_points: 三个名词并列作主语，因此谓语用 are。
for determining ... 说明这些 criteria 的用途。

sentences.sentence: Personality doesn't generally change much with age, although children can learn to modify some of their reactions as they learn what is expected of them.
sentences.translation: 性格通常不会随年龄发生很大变化，不过孩子可以在了解别人对自己的期望时，学会调整某些反应。

structure.text: Personality doesn't generally change much with age
although children can learn to modify some of their reactions
as they learn what is expected of them

difficult_points: although 引出性格虽稳定但反应可调整的让步关系。
what is expected of them 是 learn 的宾语从句，what 在从句中作主语。

sentences.sentence: There are some children who find it very difficult to be alone, some who need time and gradual exposure to become accustomed to being by themselves, and some who adapt easily.
sentences.translation: 有些孩子觉得独处非常困难，有些需要时间和循序渐进的接触才能习惯独处，还有些则很容易适应。

structure.text: There are some children who find it very difficult to be alone
some who need time and gradual exposure to become accustomed to being by themselves
and some who adapt easily

difficult_points: 三个 some 构成并列，分别描述三类儿童。
三个 who 均修饰对应的 children；become accustomed to 后接动名词 being。

sentences.sentence: The personality characteristics of the child who is ready to be home alone is a child who
sentences.translation: 适合独自在家的孩子应具备以下性格特征：这样的孩子……

structure.text: The personality characteristics of the child who is ready to be home alone
is a child who

difficult_points: 第一个 who 修饰 child，说明讨论对象。
句末 who 引出后续列表，源句本身未完结；主谓搭配也保留了源文异常。

sentences.sentence: - is not fearful, feels at ease in the world and is self-confident
sentences.translation: ——不胆怯，能从容面对世界，并且自信。

structure.text: is not fearful, feels at ease in the world and is self-confident

difficult_points: 这是承接 K 段 who 的列表项，省略了主语。
is、feels、is 是三个并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: - is calm, and is not excitable when something unexpected happens- is outgoing and talks about his or her feelings and thoughts readily with parents and others
sentences.translation: ——沉着，遇到意外时不易激动；性格外向，愿意向父母和他人谈论自己的感受与想法。

structure.text: is calm, and is not excitable
when something unexpected happens
is outgoing and talks about his or her feelings and thoughts readily with parents and others

difficult_points: when 从句限定不易激动的情境。
happens 后紧接连字符开启下一列表项，源文缺少空格和换行。

sentences.sentence: - admits wrongdoing, even when expecting disapproval
sentences.translation: ——即使预料会遭到反对，也会承认错误。

structure.text: admits wrongdoing
even when expecting disapproval

difficult_points: 该列表项省略了主语 the child。
when expecting ... 省略了 the child is，even 加强让步意味。

sentences.sentence: - has courage enough to resist pressure from friends and others.
sentences.translation: ——有足够勇气抵抗来自朋友和他人的压力。

structure.text: has courage enough
to resist pressure from friends and others

difficult_points: 该列表项省略了主语 the child。
enough 后的不定式说明勇气足以支持什么行动。

sentences.sentence: In many communities there are activities for school-age children whose parents work and cannot be at home in the afternoon.
sentences.translation: 许多社区都为父母上班、下午无法在家的学龄儿童提供活动。

structure.text: there are activities for school-age children
whose parents work and cannot be at home in the afternoon

difficult_points: there are 是存在句，In many communities 是地点状语。
whose 引导定语从句，修饰 children。

sentences.sentence: The importance of looking into these is stressed by child development professionals.
sentences.translation: 儿童发展专家强调了了解这些活动的重要性。

structure.text: The importance of looking into these
is stressed by child development professionals

difficult_points: looking into these 是介词 of 的动名词宾语，these 指社区活动。
is stressed 使用被动语态，by 后说明强调者。

sentences.sentence: According to James Comer of Yale University, "the period between 10 and 15 years is a time when young people re-examine their attitudes and values.
sentences.translation: 耶鲁大学的 James Comer 指出：“10岁到15岁这段时期，是年轻人重新审视自身态度和价值观的阶段。

structure.text: the period between 10 and 15 years is a time
when young people re-examine their attitudes and values

difficult_points: According to ... 交代引语来源。
when 修饰 a time；引号在后续句子才闭合，源文如此保留。

expressions.meaning_zh: 重新审视态度和价值观

sentences.sentence: They are being pressured by peers.
sentences.translation: 他们正承受同龄人的压力。

structure.text: They
are being pressured by peers

difficult_points: They 指上一句的 young people。
are being pressured 是进行时被动语态，强调压力正在施加。

sentences.sentence: They need to be protected by responsible adults who will help them examine and counter some of these attitudes."
sentences.translation: 他们需要得到负责任成年人的保护，这些成年人会帮助他们审视并抵制其中一些态度。”

structure.text: They need to be protected by responsible adults
who will help them examine and counter some of these attitudes

difficult_points: to be protected 是被动不定式；who 修饰 responsible adults。
examine 与 counter 是省略 to 的并列宾补；句末引号结束跨三句的引语。

sentences.sentence: The activities available vary as does the cost.
sentences.translation: 可选活动各不相同，费用也是如此。

structure.text: The activities available vary
as does the cost

difficult_points: available 后置修饰 activities。
as does the cost 是倒装结构，表示费用同样有差异。

sentences.sentence: Some are more popular with children than others, and some are more rewarding, but all are preferable to sitting at home in front of the television.
sentences.translation: 有些活动比其他活动更受孩子欢迎，有些更有收获，但所有这些都胜过坐在家里看电视。

structure.text: Some are more popular with children than others
and some are more rewarding
but all are preferable to sitting at home in front of the television

difficult_points: 三个不定代词分别指不同活动和全部活动。
preferable to 中 to 是介词，后接动名词 sitting。

sentences.sentence: These programmes can vary in cost or are free, depending upon the particular activity and the age of the child.
sentences.translation: 这些项目的费用可能各不相同，也可能免费，具体取决于活动类型和孩子的年龄。

structure.text: These programmes can vary in cost or are free
depending upon the particular activity and the age of the child

difficult_points: vary 与 are free 是由 or 连接的两种收费情况。
depending ... 是现在分词状语，说明费用的决定因素。

sentences.sentence: All of them offer the opportunity to acquire skills and knowledge that are useful throughout life.
sentences.translation: 所有项目都提供了获得终身有用的技能和知识的机会。

structure.text: All of them offer the opportunity
to acquire skills and knowledge
that are useful throughout life

difficult_points: to acquire ... 说明 opportunity 的具体内容。
that 修饰 skills and knowledge。

sentences.sentence: Children who are not learning anything for hours every week are at a distinct disadvantage compared to children who are engaged in enriching activities.
sentences.translation: 与参加有益活动的孩子相比，那些每周有数小时学不到任何东西的孩子处于明显劣势。

structure.text: Children who are not learning anything for hours every week
are at a distinct disadvantage
compared to children who are engaged in enriching activities

difficult_points: 两个 who 从句分别限定两类 children。
compared to ... 是过去分词比较状语；be engaged in 表示参与。

sentences.sentence: In the words of T. Berry Brazelton, of Harvard University: "During these all important bridge years between childhood and adulthood, kids really do need something constructive to do, and they also still need to have their activities supervised.
sentences.translation: 用哈佛大学 T. Berry Brazelton 的话说：“在童年与成年之间这些至关重要的过渡岁月里，孩子确实需要做些有建设性的事情，也仍然需要有人监督他们的活动。

structure.text: In the words of T. Berry Brazelton, of Harvard University
During these all important bridge years between childhood and adulthood
kids really do need something constructive to do, and they also still need to have their activities supervised

difficult_points: T. 后的句点属于姓名缩写，不应切断句子。
do 强调 need；have their activities supervised 是使役结构，表示让活动受到监督。

sentences.sentence: Most of all, they need to know that their parents care about them, are involved in their lives, and have their best interests at heart."
sentences.translation: 最重要的是，他们需要知道父母关心自己、参与自己的生活，并始终把自己的最大利益放在心上。”

structure.text: they need to know
that their parents care about them, are involved in their lives, and have their best interests at heart

difficult_points: that 从句中 care、are involved、have 是共享主语 parents 的三个并列谓语。
them 与 their 均指孩子；句末引号结束引语。

expressions.text: have someone's best interests at heart
expressions.meaning_zh: 把某人的最大利益放在心上
